allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add FFT significance testing and consolidate mathematical documentation

- Implement permutation-based significance test for FFT analysis \(1000 permutations\)
- Add p-value calculation and significance flags to FFT results
- Remove ROI count from Fisher Z-transformation plot title
- Consolidate mathematical documentation into main README with comprehensive TOC
- Document complete formulas for movement analysis \(Hough, thresholds, hysteresis\)
- Document rhythmic analysis methods \(Fisher Z, FFT, Cosinor\) with statistical tests
- Add method comparison table and integrated workflow guidance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
